title: Mercury's Machine Pistol
description: WARNING: This is NOT a mod by itself, please use it with Simple Animated Guns mod.
body:
Mercury's Machine Pistol
---

A Resource Pack that do thingamajig(adding 2 cubes)

And why is this?
---

Elidhan one day just decided to not be very creative(he is tired) and slap a Pistol animation onto the Machine Pistol(crazy right?). I got really irritated with this, so it happened.

**Quote of the Pack:**

"Gang Gang."  
*Mercury MMXXIII* 

List of changes:
---

-Model(Added Suppressor)

-Animations(New reload anims to fit with new posing)

-Sound(Dampened)

[Showcase Video(OUTDATED, AWAITS UPDATE)(Youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0krkNaRYgbg)
